zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Myall於1532年出生在英國時，她的父親Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE32歲，母親Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne29歲。她於1546年8月30日與William Rice在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine Myall于1532年出生在英国时，她的父亲Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE32岁，母亲Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne29岁。她于1546年8月30日与William Rice在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Myall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Myhill
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Mihel, a vernacular form of the Biblical name Michael . See also Miles 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Myall was born in 1532, in England, her father, Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE, was 32 and her mother, Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne, was 29. She married William Rice on 30 August 1546, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1568, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine Myall est née en 1532, à Angleterre, son père, Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Rice le 30 août 1546, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1568, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.Little Fransham, Norfolk, England, Unite: Little Fransham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine Myall 1532 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE 32 und ihre Mutter Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne 29. Sie hat am 30. August 1546 in Herefordshire, England William Rice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1568 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Myall è nata il nel 1532 nel England, sua padre, Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Rice il 30 agosto 1546, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1568, nel Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Myallが1532年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNEは32歳，母Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynneは29歳であった。1546年8月30日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでWilliam Riceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Myall(이)가 1532년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1546년 8월 30일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 William Rice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Myall nasceu em 1532, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Rice em 30 de agosto de 1546, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1568, em Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ro.Little Fransham, Norfolk, England, Unite: Little Fransham, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Myall родилась в 1532 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Rice 30 августа 1546 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1568 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

Se casó con William Rice el 30 de agosto de 1546, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1568, en Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
